name: ventpals-mobile
description: VentPals mobile app — Capacitor wrapper for iOS and Android

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run build && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run build && npx cap run ios
scripts.postinstall: echo "\n✅  Dependencies installed. Run 'npm run cap:sync' to prepare iOS/Android projects."
